# CricFoot

> Free worldwide football TV guide — every live match, kick-off time in your local timezone, and the TV channels broadcasting each fixture, updated hourly.

CricFoot (cricfoot.net) is a free, ad-supported football television schedule. It covers hundreds of competitions worldwide and shows users exactly which channel to watch on, country by country. Kick-off times are automatically converted to the visitor's local timezone. The site is rebuilt hourly via GitHub Actions and served as a static export.

## Key pages

- [Home / Today's Matches](https://www.cricfoot.net/): Full live football match list for today and the next 30 days, grouped by league with kick-off times and TV channels.
- [World Cup 2026](https://www.cricfoot.net/world-cup-2026): FIFA World Cup 2026 fixture hub — schedule, groups, and TV coverage.
- [All Channels](https://www.cricfoot.net/channels): Every TV channel carrying live football, with match counts and country coverage.
- [Countries](https://www.cricfoot.net/countries): Browse TV coverage by country — see which channels broadcast football in your region.
- [About](https://www.cricfoot.net/about): What CricFoot is, how it works, and data sourcing.

## Top league pages

- [EPL TV Schedule](https://www.cricfoot.net/league/epl/): English Premier League fixtures and broadcasters.
- [UEFA Champions League TV Schedule](https://www.cricfoot.net/league/uefa-champions-league/): UCL matches and TV channels worldwide.
- [La Liga TV Schedule](https://www.cricfoot.net/league/la-liga/): Spanish La Liga fixtures and broadcasters.
- [Serie A TV Schedule](https://www.cricfoot.net/league/serie-a/): Italian Serie A fixtures and broadcasters.
- [Bundesliga TV Schedule](https://www.cricfoot.net/league/bundesliga/): German Bundesliga fixtures and broadcasters.
- [Ligue 1 TV Schedule](https://www.cricfoot.net/league/ligue-1/): French Ligue 1 fixtures and broadcasters.

## Schedule pages

- [Daily Schedule](https://www.cricfoot.net/schedules/2026-06-18/): Full match list for any specific date (format: /schedules/YYYY-MM-DD/).

## Data and coverage

- Match data is sourced from a third-party football data API and refreshed hourly.
- Kick-off times are stored as UTC Unix timestamps and converted to local time in the browser.
- TV channel listings cover 150+ countries.
- Historical schedules are available from 2026-01-01.
- The site does not stream or broadcast any content — it is a TV guide only.

## Tech stack

- Framework: Next.js 15 (App Router, static export)
- Hosting: GitHub Pages (custom domain cricfoot.net)
- Rebuild: GitHub Actions cron (hourly)
- No server-side rendering; all pages are pre-rendered at build time.
